create.title: Celestial Glow Serum
create.subtitle: Eternal Radiance in a Drop.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
Born from the observation of light refracting through ancient glacial ice, the Celestial Glow Serum is designed to recreate the specific luminosity of a dawn sky. It is for the visionary who seeks a complexion that doesn't just look healthy, but appears illuminated from within a celestial shell.

### The Formula
A breakthrough in bio-luminance technology. This water-light concentrate uses suspended micro-pearls and diamond dust to physically scatter light across the skin’s surface, instantly blurring imperfections. Beyond immediate aesthetics, a potent blend of fermented Sea Kelp and vectorized Vitamin C works over 28 days to naturally brighten and unify skin tone.

### The Ritual
After cleansing, apply 3-4 drops onto the fingertips. Press firmly into the skin using an upward motion, starting from the center of the face and working outward. Ideal as a primer under foundation for a "lit-from-within" effect.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Encapsulated Diamond Dust:** Provides multi-dimensional light refraction.
*   **Fermented Sea Kelp:** Rich in iodine and minerals to restore the skin’s moisture barrier.
*   **Vectorized Vitamin C:** Stabilized for deep penetration and lasting radiance.

### Clinical Claims
*   **98%** of users saw an immediate "glass-skin" finish.
*   **92%** reported significantly brighter skin after 4 weeks.
*   **24-hour** hydration maintained after a single application.

### Packaging
Heavy-weight tapered glass bottle with a recyclable precision glass dropper. FSC-certified outer carton printed with soy-based metallic inks.

### Full INCI
Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Propanediol, Ascorbyl Tetraisopalmitate (Vitamin C), Macrocystis Pyrifera (Kelp) Extract, Diamond Powder, Sodium Hyaluronate, Mica, Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891), Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin.

create.title: Midnight Velvet Lipstick
create.subtitle: Pigment with a Soul.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The "Midnight Velvet" collection was inspired by the tactile elegance of high-fashion velvet drapes in Parisian opera houses. It represents a paradox: the depth of the shadows combined with the softness of a petal.

### The Formula
Our "Liquid Velvet" technology allows for an unprecedented concentration of pigment without the dry, heavy feel of traditional matte lipsticks. Infused with black orchid extract, the formula glides on like a cream but sets to a weightless, soft-focus finish that won't feather or bleed for up to 12 hours.

### The Ritual
Define the lip contour with the precision edge of the bullet, then fill in for a bold, saturated look. For a "just-bitten" romantic effect, dab onto the center of the lips and blend outward with a fingertip.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Black Orchid Extract:** For intense hydration and antioxidant protection.
*   **Silk-Polymer Matrix:** Ensures a weightless, flexible feel that moves with the lips.
*   **Carbon-Black Pigments:** For the deepest, most opaque color payoff available.

### Clinical Claims
*   **12-hour** wear time with zero feathering or bleeding.
*   **100%** reported "weightless" feel during entire wear.
*   **95%** noticed smoother lip texture after 7 days of use.

### Packaging
Sculptural matte black aluminum casing with magnetic closure and gold-engraved logo. Refillable design.

### Full INCI
Octyldodecanol, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Isononyl Isononanoate, Cycnoches Cooperi (Black Orchid) Extract, Euphorbia Cerifera (Candelilla) Wax, Silica, Diamond Powder, Tocopherol, [+/- Iron Oxides (CI 77491, CI 77492, CI 77499), Red 7 Lake (CI 15850)].

create.title: Liquid Silk Foundation
create.subtitle: The Second Skin of Royalty.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The quest for the "Unseen Foundation." We wanted to create a product that provides the coverage of a professional filter while remaining completely invisible to the naked eye, mimicking the natural drape of silk on skin.

### The Formula
This bi-phase emulsion uses "adaptive-tint" technology that adjusts to the skin's subtle undertones upon contact. The SPF 15 formula is enriched with high-altitude Edelweiss extract, protecting against urban pollutants while providing a satin-glass finish that mimics the elasticity of youthful skin.

### The Ritual
Shake well before use. Apply 1-2 pumps onto a buffing brush or damp blender. Start at the center of the face and blend outward in circular motions. Build coverage where needed; the formula is specifically designed to remain cake-free even with multiple layers.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Edelweiss Extract:** A powerful antioxidant that thrives in extreme conditions.
*   **Hyaluronic Filling Spheres:** Smooths fine lines and locks in moisture.
*   **Micro-Silk Powders:** Absorbs excess oil while maintaining a luminous glow.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Non-comedogenic** and dermatologist tested for sensitive skin.
*   **Blurs** pores and fine lines by **75%** upon application.
*   **Humidity-resistant** for up to 16 hours.

### Packaging
Frosted glass vessel with a high-prestige metallic atmospheric pump (prevents oxidation).

### Full INCI
Aqua, Cyclopentasiloxane, Dimethicone, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate (SPF 15), Leontopodium Alpinum (Edelweiss) Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Hydrolyzed Silk, Silica, Glycerin, Magnesium Sulfate, Iron Oxides.

create.title: Stardust Eyeshadow Palette
create.subtitle: Paint Your Own Galaxy.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The ethereal beauty of a nebula. This palette is a curation of the universe’s most dramatic shades—celestial golds, deep galactic plums, and starlit teals—designed to take your gaze from the terrestrial to the divine.

### The Formula
Each pan is crafted using our "Wet-Hot" pressing technique, which preserves the crystalline structure of the shimmers for maximum brilliance. The mattes are cream-infused, preventing fallout and ensuring a professional-grade blend even for the most intricate looks.

### The Ritual
Use a flat brush to pack shimmers onto the eyelid for maximum impact. Use a fluffy blending brush to sweep transition mattes into the crease. For a metallic "liquid-foil" effect, dampen your brush before application.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Spherical Silica:** Ensures a buttery-smooth glide and effortless blending.
*   **Refined Mineral Pigments:** ethically sourced, high-purity color.
*   **Carnauba Wax:** Provides the "grip" that ensures 16-hour wear.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Zero-fallout** technology confirmed by professional MUAs.
*   **High-intensity** pigment payoff in a single swipe.
*   **Safe** for contact lens wearers; ophthalmologist tested.

### Packaging
Ultra-slim metal palette with a high-definition mirror. Plastic-free construction.

### Full INCI
Mica, Talc-Free Silica, Magnesium Stearate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Copernicia Cerifera (Carnauba) Wax, Boron Nitride, Tin Oxide, [+/- Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891), Iron Oxides, Manganese Violet].

create.title: Auric Rose Face Oil
create.subtitle: Liquid Gold for the Soul.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The timeless luxury of gold and the vulnerability of the rose. This oil is a celebration of ritualistic beauty, designed to be the centerpiece of your skincare vanity.

### The Formula
A masterclass in botanical alchemy. Suspended 24k gold flakes act as a conductive medium, enhancing the penetration of our 7-seed oil blend. Cold-pressed Rosehip and Squalane deliver essential fatty acids, while the scent of 1,000 Bulgarian Roses provides a grounding, aromatherapeutic experience.

### The Ritual
As the final step of your evening routine, warm 3 drops in your palms. Inhale the fragrance deeply for three breaths. Gently press into the face, neck, and décolletage. Can also be mixed with foundation for an extra-dewy, goddess-like glow.

### Key Ingredients
*   **24k Gold Flakes:** Enhances micro-circulation and adds instant radiance.
*   **Cold-Pressed Rosehip Oil:** Naturally rich in Vitamin A (Retinol) for skin renewal.
*   **Squalane (Plant-Derived):** Mimics the skin’s natural oils for deep hydration.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Boosts** skin elasticity by **30%** in 2 weeks.
*   **Instantly** increases skin hydration levels by **60%**.
*   **100%** non-greasy, fast-absorbing dry oil finish.

### Packaging
Apothecary-style clear glass bottle with a genuine gold-plated rim.

### Full INCI
Squalane, Rosa Canina (Rosehip) Fruit Oil, Gold (CI 77480), Rosa Damascena Flower Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Tocopheryl Acetate, Citronellol, Geraniol.

create.title: Obsidian Mascara
create.subtitle: Depth Beyond Measure.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The sharp, clean lines of modern architecture and the depth of volcanic glass. This is the mascara for the minimalist who demands maximum impact.

### The Formula
Our "Obsidian-Link" fiber technology wraps each individual lash in a lightweight, carbon-black tube. Unlike heavy waxes that weigh lashes down, this water-resistant polymer formula holds a curl all day while being easy to remove with warm water.

### Ritual
Place the brush at the base of the lashes and wiggle upward in a "Z" motion. For a wide-eyed, sculptural look, focus on the outer lashes to create a feline lift.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Carbon Black Polymers:** For a jet-black finish that never grays.
*   **Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5):** Strengthens lashes and prevents breakage over time.
*   **Candelilla Wax:** Provides a flexible, long-lasting hold.

### Clinical Claims
*   **300%** increase in visible lash volume.
*   **24-hour** smudge-proof and flake-proof hold.
*   **Lash-Density** increase noted by **88%** of users after 8 weeks.

### Packaging
Weighted high-gloss obsidian-style tube with a custom-engineered elastomer brush.

### Full INCI
Aqua, Acrylates Copolymer, Euphorbia Cerifera (Candelilla) Wax, Stearic Acid, Panthenol, Cellulose, Carbon Black (CI 77266), PVP, Phenoxyethanol.

create.title: Prism Highlighter
create.subtitle: Sculpted by Light.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The way morning light breaks through a crystal prism. We wanted to capture that precise, fleeting shimmer and make it wearable for the modern face.

### The Formula
A hybrid "Gel-to-Powder" formula that melts into the skin. Using high-definition prismatic pigments, the highlighter reflects light in multiple directions, ensuring you never have "streakiness"—only a seamless, multi-dimensional glow that looks like real skin, only better.

### The Ritual
Sweep over the high points of the face (cheekbones, brow bone, bridge of the nose, and cupid's bow) using a fan brush. For a more intense, "glass-skin" look, use a damp fingertip to tap directly onto the skin.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Chameleon Pigments:** Adjusts its reflection based on your skin’s undertone.
*   **Wild Orchid Extract:** Softens the skin and provides a silky finish.
*   **Cross-Linked Silicones:** Ensure the product doesn't settle into fine lines.

### Clinical Claims
*   **16-hour** multi-dimensional glow.
*   **Zero-texture** finish; does not emphasize pores or wrinkles.
*   **Moisture-locking** properties confirmed for up to 8 hours.

### Packaging
Minimalist glass compact with a recycled aluminum pan.

### Full INCI
Dimethicone, Mica, Synthetic Fluorphlogopite, Cymbidium Grandiflorum (Orchid) Flower Extract, Silica, Magnesium Myristate, Tin Oxide, Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891).

create.title: Nectar Hydrating Mist
create.subtitle: Floral Dew, Captured.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
A spring rain shower in a blossom-filled garden. The Nectar Mist is your portable oasis, designed to combat the dulling effects of air travel, heating, and stress.

### The Formula
Enriched with ultra-low-molecular-weight Hyaluronic Acid, this mist reaches the deeper layers of the epidermis to hydrate from within. A proprietary blend of Lotus Water and Rose Hydrosol calms redness and sets makeup with a natural, dewy finish.

### The Ritual
Hold the bottle 10 inches away from the face, close your eyes, and mist in a circular motion. Use after cleansing, after makeup, or anytime throughout the day for an instant boost of freshness.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Sacred Lotus Water:** Naturally purifying and calming for sensitive skin.
*   **Triple-Weight Hyaluronic Acid:** Hydrates at multiple skin depths.
*   **White Tea Extract:** A potent antioxidant to protect against environmental stressors.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Instantly** lowers skin surface temperature by **2°C**.
*   **Increases** skin moisture by **110%** in one spray.
*   **Sets** makeup for up to **12 hours** extra wear.

### Packaging
Slender gradient glass bottle with a micro-mist actuator (reusable).

### Full INCI
Nelumbo Nucifera (Lotus) Flower Water, Aqua, Glycerin, Sodium Hyaluronate, Camellia Sinensis (White Tea) Leaf Extract, Rosa Damascena Flower Water, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Potassium Sorbate.

create.title: Eclipse Eyeliner
create.subtitle: The Power of Precision.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The precision of a calligraphy pen and the absolute darkness of a solar eclipse. Designed for those who view their eyeliner as an extension of their artistic identity.

### The Formula
A fast-drying, vegan ink that is resistant to water, sweat, and friction. The "Flexi-Tip" technology allows for a range of styles—from the thinnest "invisible" line to bold, graphic wings—without ever skipping or dragging on the delicate eye area.

### The Ritual
Starting at the inner corner of the eye, draw short, connecting strokes toward the outer corner. To create a wing, follow the angle of your lower lash line and sweep upward toward the tail of the eyebrow.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Carbon-Micro-Pigments:** Ensures the blackest-black finish in the industry.
*   **Acacia Senegal Gum:** A natural resin that ensures the formula adheres perfectly.
*   **Aloe Vera Leaf Juice:** Calms the eyelid and allows for smooth application.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Waterproof** and friction-proof for **24 hours**.
*   **Ultra-matte** carbon finish with zero shine.
*   **Skips-free** application confirmed by **99%** of users.

### Packaging
Matte white aluminum pen with a precision-felt nib.

### Full INCI
Aqua, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Acacia Senegal Gum, Carbon Black (CI 77266), Glycerin, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Dehydroacetate.

create.title: Moonbeam Night Cream
create.subtitle: Restoration Under the Stars.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The quiet, restorative power of the moonlight. This cream is the cornerstone of the "Sleep Aesthetic," designed to help your skin recover while you dream.

### The Formula
A decadent, cocooning cream that uses "Clock-Gene" technology to synchronize with your skin’s nocturnal repair cycle. Infused with Moonstone extract and Encapsulated Retinol, it aggressively targets fine lines and uneven texture while you sleep, without the irritation typically associated with high-dose actives.

### The Ritual
After serums, warm a pearl-sized amount between your palms. Gently massage into the face and neck using slow, rhythmic strokes. Allow the calming scent of Lavender and Moonstone to prepare you for rest.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Moonstone Extract:** Balances skin energy and provides a trace-element boost.
*   **Encapsulated Retinol:** Time-released to minimize irritation while maximizing results.
*   **Murumuru Butter:** A rich, Amazonian emollient that restores the protective barrier.

### Clinical Claims
*   **45%** reduction in fine line depth after 6 weeks.
*   **97%** reported firmer, more elastic skin upon waking.
*   **Zero-irritation** potential; safe for first-time retinol users.

### Packaging
Deep violet glass jar with a weighted polished silver lid.

### Full INCI
Aqua, Astrocaryum Murumuru Seed Butter, Retinol (Encapsulated), Moonstone Extract, Glycerin, Cetearyl Alcohol, Hyaluronic Acid, Tocopherol, Lavandula Angustifolia Oil.

create.title: Nebula Glow Blush
create.subtitle: Stardust in a Flush.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The soft, expansive colors of distant nebulae. We wanted to capture the look of a natural flush as it would appear under a violet-tinted star, ethereal and weightless.

### The Formula
A revolutionary liquid-to-silk texture. Utilizing "Micro-Nebula" pigments that adapt to the skin's pH, this blush creates a customized shade of mauve that looks like a natural expansion of your own pulse. The water-based formula is breathable and allows for effortless blending without disturbing underlying makeup.

### The Ritual
Apply two small dots to the apples of the cheeks. Using a damp sponge or fingertips, blend upward toward the temples for a lifted, radiant effect.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Iridescent Cloud Pigments:** Blurs pores while adding a soft-focus glow.
*   **Niacinamide:** Helps improve skin texture and tone over time.
*   **Arctic Berry Extract:** A cold-pressed antioxidant for skin resilience.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Weightless** finish that merges with skin for **12 hours**.
*   **89%** reduction in visible pore size after application.
*   **Hydrating** formula that maintains skin dewiness all day.

### Packaging
Frosted glass bottle with a precision dropper and violet-gradient finish.

### Full INCI
Aqua, Glycerin, Niacinamide, Arctic Berry (Rubus Chamaemorus) Extract, Silica, Mica, [+/- Red 33 (CI 17200), Blue 1 (CI 42090)].

create.title: Zenith Brow Gel
create.subtitle: Sculpted to Perfection.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The precision of high-altitude navigation and the structural integrity of modern architecture. For the brow that demands both discipline and natural flow.

### The Formula
A crystal-clear, ultra-high-hold resin that sets without stiffness. Unlike traditional gels that can flake or turn "crunchy," Zenith uses flexible polymers that hold hairs in place while allowing them to move naturally. It is the ultimate tool for the "Laminated Brow" look.

### The Ritual
Using the micro-precision spoolie, brush hairs upward from the inner corner to the arch. For a more dramatic, architectural look, use the flat side of the wand to press hairs firmly against the skin.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Pro-Vitamin B5 (Panthenol):** Conditions and strengthens brow hairs.
*   **Castor Oil:** Promotes fuller, healthier-looking brows.
*   **Water-Resistant Polymers:** Ensures all-day hold through humidity and sweat.

### Clinical Claims
*   **16-hour** architectural hold with zero flaking.
*   **100%** reported "laminated" look with daily use.
*   **Strengthens** brow hair density by **15%** in 30 days.

### Packaging
Slender glass tube with a polished chrome silver cap.

### Full INCI
Aqua, PVP, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Panthenol, Carbomer, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin.

create.title: Vortex Lip Gloss
create.subtitle: Infinite Shine.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The gravitational pull of a black hole—everything drawn into a single point of intense light. Vortex is about being impossible to ignore.

### The Formula
A non-sticky, high-refractive index gloss that mimics the surface of liquid glass. Infused with cooling menthol and ginger root, it provides an instant and visible plumping effect. The holographic particles are micro-suspended to ensure a smooth feel on the lips.

### The Ritual
Apply alone for a "wet-glass" holographic effect, or layer over Midnight Velvet Lipstick to add a prismatic dimension to your signature shade.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Ginger Root Extract:** Stimulates circulation for natural plumping.
*   **Hyaluronic Acid Spheres:** Attracts moisture for long-lasting volume.
*   **Plant-Based Squalane:** Provides deep hydration and a mirror-like shine.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Instantly** increases lip volume by **25%** upon application.
*   **8-hour** high-gloss retention with no stickiness.
*   **92%** noticed smoother lip contours after 14 days.

### Packaging
Minimalist square glass bottle with a high-prestige prism-cut applicator.

### Full INCI
Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Squalane, Zingiber Officinale (Ginger) Root Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Menthol, Mica, Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891).

create.title: Solstice Bronzing Balm
create.subtitle: Golden Hour, Bottled.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
That precise moment during the solstice when the sun is at its zenith. It’s for the skin that looks like it’s been kissed by the sun but treated by a scientist.

### The Formula
A luxury balm-to-powder bronzer that creates a seamless shadow. We avoided orange or muddy undertones, focusing instead on neutral, sun-drenched pigments that mimic the natural darkening of skin. The formula is enriched with Vitamin E to ensure it never looks dry or patchy.

### The Ritual
Swirl a large, dense brush into the compact and tap off excess. Sweep in a "3" motion starting from the forehead, down to the cheekbones, and along the jawline.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Raw Cacao Butter:** For a buttery-smooth application and delicious scent.
*   **Vitamin E:** A classic antioxidant to protect and soothe the skin.
*   **Finely Milled Mica:** Provides a subtle, skin-like radiance.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Seamless** blending for a "second-skin" bronze finish.
*   **Dermatologist tested**; safe for breakout-prone skin.
*   **Sweat-resistant** for active wear up to 12 hours.

### Packaging
Sleek circular metallic gold compact with a large interior mirror.

### Full INCI
Theobroma Cacao (Cacao) Seed Butter, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Mica, Iron Oxides (CI 77491, CI 77492, CI 77499).

create.title: Aether Setting Powder
create.subtitle: Weightless Perfection.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The unseen element that binds the universe together. Total clarity, total weightlessness.

### The Formula
Milled to a particle size of less than 5 microns, this powder is physically incapable of looking heavy. It utilizes light-refracting silica that blurs the appearance of fine lines and pores while maintaining the skin’s natural luminosity. It is the "HD filter" in physical form.

### The Ritual
Dip a large fluffy brush into the jar and tap off the excess into the lid. Softly buff into the skin, focusing on the T-zone or any areas prone to shine.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Spherical Silica:** Absorbs excess sebum while maintaining a "glow" finish.
*   **Rose Quartz Essence:** Said to promote skin energy and a soft-pink tone.
*   **Minimalist Mineral Base:** Free from talc and parabens.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Flashback-proof** for professional photography.
*   **Reduces** appearances of pores by **85%**.
*   **All-day** oil control without drying the skin.

### Packaging
Heavy crystal-cut glass jar with a signature minimalist black lid.

### Full INCI
Mica, Silica, Rose Quartz Powder, Magnesium Stearate, Lauroyl Lysine, Iron Oxides.

create.title: Opaline Eye Shimmer
create.subtitle: Pearlized Gaze.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The structural color of an opal—shifting and multi-dimensional depending on how the light hits.

### The Formula
A high-pigment liquid shadow that sets in 30 seconds to a crease-proof, waterproof finish. The "Prismatic-Set" technology ensures that the iridescence won't flake off onto the cheeks, keeping the focuses strictly on the eyes.

### The Ritual
Swipe directly onto the eyelid using the applicator. For a sheer wash of color, blend out immediately with a fingertip. For an intense liquid-metal look, apply a second layer once the first has set.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Synthetic Fluorophlogopite:** High-purity shimmer for intense pearl effects.
*   **Cucumber Extract:** Cools and depuffs the eye area on application.
*   **Marine Collagen:** Helps firm and smooth the delicate eyelid skin.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Crease-proof** and smudge-proof for **16 hours**.
*   **Ophthalmologist tested** for sensitive eyes.
*   **Instant** cooling effect upon application.

### Packaging
Slim glass vial with a precision-tapered brush applicator.

### Full INCI
Aqua, Synthetic Fluorphlogopite, Cucumis Sativus (Cucumber) Fruit Extract, Marine Collagen, Glycerin, Mica, [+/- Ferric Ferrocyanide (CI 77510)].

create.title: Crystalline Cleansing Balm
create.subtitle: Purity Redefined.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
Beginning at the source. Purity, clarity, and the ritual of shedding the day.

### The Formula
A transformative solid-to-oil balm. Upon contact with the skin, it melts into a luxurious oil that dissolves even the most stubborn waterproof makeup and environmental pollutants. When water is added, it emulsifies into a milky lotion that rinses away clean, leaving zero residue.

### The Ritual
Massage a dime-sized amount into dry skin for 60 seconds. Add a splash of warm water to emulsify. Rinse thoroughly or wipe away with a warm, damp muslin cloth for a gentle exfoliation.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Sunflower Seed Oil:** A non-comedogenic oil rich in Linoleic Acid.
*   **Vitamin B3 (Niacinamide):** Calms skin during the cleansing process.
*   **Sea Buckthorn Oil:** Rich in Omega-7 to promote skin health.

### Clinical Claims
*   **99%** removal of waterproof makeup and SPF in one step.
*   **Retains** 100% of skin’s natural moisture barrier.
*   **Zero-residue** finish; no second cleanse required.

### Packaging
Large heavy frosted glass jar with an aluminum spatula included.

### Full INCI
Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, PEG-20 Glyceryl Triisostearate, Niacinamide, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) Oil, Cera Alba.

create.title: Nova Nail Lacquer
create.subtitle: Cosmic Fingertips.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The architectural form of a skyscraper at night. Geometric, bold, and high-gloss.

### The Formula
A 10-free, salon-grade lacquer that provides the look of a gel mani without the UV lamp. The "Titanium-Polymer" blend ensures a chip-resistant finish for up to 10 days, while the precision paddle brush allows for a streak-free, professional application in two strokes.

### The Ritual
Apply one layer of base coat, followed by two thin layers of Nova Lacquer. Finish with a high-shine top coat to seal in the cosmic depth.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Bamboo Extract:** Strengthens the nail plate naturally.
*   **Garlic Extract:** A traditional remedy for nail growth and resilience.
*   **Carbon Pigments:** For unparalleled depth and opacity.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Chip-resistant** for up to **10 days**.
*   **High-shine** gel finish without UV light.
*   **Dries** in under **3 minutes**.

### Packaging
Tapered, sculptural glass bottle with a weighted silver cap.

### Full INCI
Butyl Acetate, Ethyl Acetate, Nitrocellulose, Bambusa Vulgaris (Bamboo) Extract, Allium Sativum (Garlic) Bulb Extract, Carbon Black (CI 77266), Iron Oxides.

create.title: Halo Face Primer
create.subtitle: The Divine Filter.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The soft, glowing ring of light around a celestial body. The perfect preparation for what follows.

### The Formula
A water-based gel primer that acts as a moisture magnet. Suspended 24k gold flakes provide a subtle warmth to the complexion, while "Grip-Tech" polymers ensure foundation adheres perfectly for 16-hour wear. It bridges the gap between high-end skincare and professional makeup.

### The Ritual
Apply a pearl-sized amount to the fingers and warm slightly. Smooth over the entire face, starting from the center. Wait 30 seconds for the "grip" to develop before applying foundation.

### Key Ingredients
*   **24k Gold Flecks:** Improves skin radiance and warmth.
*   **Glycerin:** A powerhouse humectant for all-day hydration.
*   **White Willow Bark:** Gently exfoliates to refine skin texture over time.

### Clinical Claims
*   **Extends** makeup wear for up to **16 hours**.
*   **Instant** hydration boost of **40%**.
*   **Smooths** skin texture by **65%** before foundation.

### Packaging
Translucent glass pump bottle with a gold-foil seal.

### Full INCI
Aqua, Glycerin, Gold (CI 77480), Salix Alba (White Willow) Bark Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Carbomer, Mica.

create.title: Radiance Body Oil
create.subtitle: Solar Glow.
create.description:
### The Inspiration
The golden hour in the desert. Expansive, warm, and utterly luxurious.

### The Formula
A "Dry-Touch" oil that sinks into the skin instantly, leaving only a shimmering veil of light. We used a blend of ultra-light oils (Fractionated Coconut and Jojoba) to ensure you can get dressed immediately after application. The copper-gold shimmer is specifically calibrated to enhance all skin tones.

### The Ritual
Massage into limbs using long, sweeping motions. Pay extra attention to the collarbones, shoulders, and shins to create a high-fashion, sculpted effect.

### Key Ingredients
*   **Fractionated Coconut Oil:** Lightweight, non-greasy hydration.
*   **Jojoba Seed Oil:** Mimics skin's natural sebum for extreme compatibility.
*   **Vitamin C (Esther):** For long-term skin brightening and antioxidant protection.

### Clinical Claims
*   **100%** dry-touch finish; zero transfer to clothing.
*   **Instantly** illuminates limbs with a solar-gold glow.
*   **Improves** skin luminosity by **25%** with daily use.

### Packaging
Large, elegant flat glass bottle with a recycled gold-toned sprayer.

### Full INCI
Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride (Coconut), Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Tetrahexyldecyl Ascorbate (Vitamin C), Mica, Tin Oxide, Iron Oxides.
